  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractClientManager
    Abstract base class for client managers.
    AbstractDirector<T>
    Abstract base class for directors in the builder pattern.
    AbstractFileConsoleReader<T>
    Abstract base class for reading commands from a file.
    AbstractFileManager<T>
    Abstract base class for file management operations.
    AutoGeneratedId<T>
    Interface for objects that have an automatically generated identifier.
    BaseConsoleClientManager
    Base console implementation of client managers for both Product and Person objects.
    BaseFileConsoleClientManager
    File-based implementation of client managers for both Product and Person objects.
    Builder<T>
    Interface for the builder pattern, providing methods to construct objects.
    ClearCommand<K,V>
    Command to clear all elements from the collection.
    CollectionManager<K,T>
    Manages a collection of products stored in a Hashtable.
    Color
    Represents a color enumeration.
    Command<K,V>
    Abstract base class for commands in the application.
    CommandManager<K,V>
    Manages the registration and execution of console commands.
    ConsoleFileManager
    File-based implementation of the ReaderWriter interface.
    ConsoleManager
    Console implementation of the ReaderWriter interface.
    Coordinates
    The Coordinates class represents a pair of coordinates with an x (Long) and y (double) value.
    CountGreaterThanPriceCommand<K,V>
    Command to count elements with price greater than the specified value.
    Country
    Represents a country enumeration.
    ExecuteScriptCommand<K,V>
    Command to execute a script from a file.
    ExitCommand<K,V>
    Command to exit the program without saving.
    FilesStack
    Utility class for managing a stack of files during script execution.
    HelpCommand<K,V>
    Command to display help information for all available commands.
    InfoCommand<K,V>
    Command to display information about the collection.
    InsertCommand<K,V>
    Command to insert a new element with the specified key.
    LongIdManager<T>
    Manager class for handling Long-type auto-generated IDs.
    Main
     
    ObjectReader<T>
    Abstract base class for reading and constructing objects.
    ParseKey<T>
    Interface for parsing string values into objects of a specific type.
    Person
    Represents a person with name, height, hair color, and nationality.
    PersonBuilder<T>
    Builder class for constructing Person objects with a fluent interface.
    PersonClientManager<T>
    Interface for client managers that handle Person objects.
    PersonDirector<T>
    Director class for constructing Person objects with predefined configurations.
    PersonFileReader<T>
    File-based reader class for reading Person objects from script files.
    PersonReader<T>
    Reader class for interactive console input of Person objects.
    PrintFieldDescendingPriceCommand<K,V>
    Command to print all price values in descending order.
    PrintUniqueUnitOfMeasureCommand<K,V>
    Command to print all unique unit of measure values from the collection.
    Product
    Represents a product with various attributes such as id, name, coordinates, creation date, price, part number, manufacture cost, unit of measure, and owner.
    ProductBuilder<T>
    Builder class for constructing Product objects with a fluent interface.
    ProductClientManager<T>
    Interface for client managers that handle Product objects.
    ProductDirector<T>
    Director class for constructing Product objects with predefined configurations.
    ProductFileReader<T>
    File-based reader class for reading Product objects from script files.
    ProductReader<T>
    Reader class for interactive console input of Product objects.
    ProductXmlFileManager<K,T>
    XML file manager for saving and loading Product collections using XStream library.
    ReaderWriter
    Interface for basic input/output operations.
    RemoveGreaterKeyCommand<K,V>
    Command to remove all elements with keys greater than the specified key.
    RemoveKeyCommand<K,V>
    Command to remove an element from the collection by its key.
    RemoveLowerCommand<K,V>
    Command to remove all elements smaller than the specified element.
    ReplaceIfGreaterCommand<K,V>
    Command to replace an element by key if the new value is greater than the old one.
    SaveCommand<K,V>
    Command to save the collection to a file.
    ShowCommand<K,V>
    Command to display all elements of the collection in string representation.
    StringKeyParser
    Parser for string keys.
    UnitOfMeasure
    Represents a unit of measure enumeration.
    UpdateCommand<K,V>
    Command to update an element in the collection by its ID.
